185 F0400G_PRVT_PHNE_CD F0400G_PRVT_PHNE_CD F0400G Interview for Daily Preferences: Private Phone Time Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they have be able to use the phone in private while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat
